Tenant subdomain assigned by Akeneo.

REST API for the Akeneo Product Information Management (PIM) platform.
Manage products, product models, families, attributes, categories,
channels, locales, assets, reference entities, catalogs, workflows,
and more. Authentication uses OAuth 2.0 client credentials with
per-tenant base URLs in the SaaS edition.
